text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One afternoon, Grass Wonder and I sit down to unwind after the day's
training session.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for today, Trainer. I found some good tea, so I'd like to
make you a cup.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Still, while I understand the need to recover after my last race, it
seems a shame to shorten our training sessions to this extent.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
For the past few days, we've been finishing before the sun even goes
down...
choice_data_list: We should prioritize resting for now.
We should prioritize resting for now.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I know that, of course. I'll need a well-rested body to win...
Right?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
"The last drop makes the cup run over," as they say. I am always
grateful for your kind consideration. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ding, dong...

text_block_list.name: School PA
text_block_list.text: Grass Wonder, please report to the student council president's office.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh, what could that be about?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I'm back, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I was asked to participate in a scrimmage for the upcoming school
orientation.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It will be quite an honor to show my racing to new students who hope
to one day run in the Twinkle Series. ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I should start training immediately—oh? Is that a look of concern on
your face?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Ah, that's right. I was swept up in the excitement of being selected
for the race.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Well then, I will limit myself to some light running in preparation.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Please don't trouble yourself to accompany me. I'll be fine controlling
my own pace.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She says she'll keep her running under control, but this is the same
racer who turned down offers until she was perfectly satisfied.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once she decides to win, even if it's just a scrimmage, she'll tackle the
challenge with everything she has... I should keep an eye on her.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Phew... Three more laps... But faster this time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Sure enough, I see her training as if there's a big race coming up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I know how she feels about winning, so I keep my distance,
watching just to make sure she doesn't go overboard.

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Such incredible speed! Grass Wonder makes a huge final sprint!

text_block_list.name: Caster Umamusume
text_block_list.text: And across the line! Grass Wonder takes first!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder's win is overwhelming. As soon as the race is over, the
young students begin to gather around her.

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Heeey! That was awesome!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: You look real nice, but inside you're a beast! You're super cool!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Heehee, what a privilege to be called a beast. ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer. Do I have something on my face?

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I really hope you race in the Twinkle Series! You gotta win, beast
lady!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry—I won't fail. And when you're older, we can all race
together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From today's scrimmage, I can see that Grass wants to win more than
ever. And I'll be supporting her every step of the way.
